patterns.name: Pricing date not found
patterns.trigger: No pricing data found for date
patterns.root_cause: The date specified in the test scenario does not have pricing data in this environment. Common on release branch where market data is behind.
patterns.fix: Shift the pricing date forward by 30 days in the affected test scenarios. Look for date parameters passed to pricing/valuation action calls.

patterns.name: Trade approval prerequisite missing
patterns.trigger: ApprovalAction failed: trade must be in INTENT state before approval
patterns.root_cause: In the release environment, the workflow requires an explicit SetIntentAction before ApprovalAction. On master this step is implicit.
patterns.fix: Insert SetIntentAction call immediately before any ApprovalAction in affected scenarios.

patterns.name: Valuation baseline drift after fee change
patterns.root_cause: Jupiter valuation formula changed (e.g. handling fee added). All scenarios asserting on totalValueUsd need their baseline values recalculated.
patterns.fix: Recalculate expected baseline: multiply old value by the new fee factor (1 + fee_rate). Update all affected CompareBaselineAction calls.
